name: Asian Marinated Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Med. cloves garlic, smashed and peeled
3/8 oz Peeled fresh ginger (cut into 1/4 inch slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick the eggplants several times with a fork.
2. Pull off any leaves.
3. Cut each eggplant in half lengthwise.
4. Make three deep diagonal slashes on each half, in both directions.
5. Place the cut sides of the eggplant halves skin side down in an oval dish.
6. Spoon 1 1/2 teaspoons of the marinade over each eggplant half.
7. Rub the marinade into the flesh so it runs into the cuts.
8. Turn the eggplants skin side up and pour any remaining marinade into the dish.
9. Let stand for 45 minutes.
10. Cover tightly with microwave plastic wrap.
11. Cook at high power for 10 minutes, then prick the plastic to release steam.
12. Remove from the microwave and uncover.
13. Spoon sauce over the eggplants.
14. Serve as a side dish alongside grilled fish steak or chicken breast (basted with a soy-based marinade).
Recommended pairings include:
- Japanese eggplants (small, skinny, light purple/lavender)
- Grilled fish
- Chicken breast
Note: The recipe may also be prepared over a wok steamer instead of in the microwave.
